name: zava-insurance-mcp-server
description: MCP App server for Zava Insurance claims management with interactive widgets

scripts.build:widgets: cross-env INPUT=widgets/claims-dashboard.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=widgets/claim-detail.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=widgets/contractors-list.html vite build
scripts.build: npm run build:widgets && npm run build:server
scripts.watch:widgets: concurrently "cross-env INPUT=widgets/claims-dashboard.html vite build --watch" "cross-env INPUT=widgets/claim-detail.html vite build --watch" "cross-env INPUT=widgets/contractors-list.html vite build --watch"
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run watch:widgets" "npm run serve"
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && npm run serve
